title: surface-opt P1 — fix MCP memory:// path
summary: This remediation pass implements the missing P1 behavior in code: the memory:// handler now resolves under lib/memory, and a regression test asserts the resolved path target ends with lib/memory and returns non-empty memory areas.
planning_context: handoff.handoff_note: Index links the delivery report, archived work artifacts, and implementation surface. A remediation pass on 2026-06-02 implemented the missing memory:// path fix and regression test; after human acceptance, run pan…
review.spec_contracts_note: No contracts/ directory under feature folder; review used behavioral delta coverage only.
intake.human_approval_note: Spec ratified at plan advance per state.json advanceHistory intake→plan event.
archival_policy: Durable feature memory stores the compact index and machine-checkable contracts only. Full specs, plans, delivery reports, generated evidence, and run artifacts are intentionally omitted; use git history or .pan/archive paths for forensic reconstruction.
